title: <div>I have reviewed the <b>Directions for the Technical Instructions Assignment
content:
I have reviewed the Directions for the Technical Instructions Assignment. Here’s a summary of the key requirements:

Technical Instructions Assignment Overview
• Write clear and concise technical instructions for a complex task in your career or academic field.
• If no relevant task is available, choose a process from technology, science, or business.
• The instructions must include:
1. Introduction Paragraph
2. Step-by-Step Instructions (at least 5 steps)
3. Conclusion Paragraph

Submission Options (Choose One)
1. Traditional Paper Format – Submit as a Word document (.doc or .docx).
2. Web Page Format – Submit an HTML file or publish on a blogspot.
3. PowerPoint Presentation – Develop as a slide-based instructional guide.

Important Guidelines
• Do not choose a process that requires research; write based on personal knowledge.
